verse_text: having made known to us the mystery of His will, according to His good pleasure which He purposed in Himself,

pericope.title: The Work of the Father, Son, and Spirit

links.context: Paul quotes an ancient Christian creed or hymn that is especially clear about the divinity of Jesus Christ. Another such creed is found in [[2TI.2:11]]-13. (See also 6:15, 16; [[EPH.1:3]]-14; 5:14; [[PHP.2:6]]-11; [[COL.1:15]]-20.) Thus, when the early Councils met and issued creeds, they were well within the mark of biblical precedent.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Mystery: See [[EPH.1:9]], [[EPH.1:10]] and note; see also Glossary.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
